title: The Black Hole In Your Room
tagline: Point your camera at reality and watch a live event horizon bend your actual light.
holy_shit: Your own room becomes spacetime — real photons from your camera stream get bent around a browser-made black hole with a glowing accretion disk and photon ring.
powered_by: A handwritten fragment shader ray-bends a live camera (or synthetic nebula fallback) texture through a Schwarzschild-inspired lensing field, with orientation anchoring and sub-bass rumble.
agent_scenario: When you need a no-backend AR-style spectacle that proves advanced physics-ish rendering, camera ingest, sensors, and sound can all run entirely in one static page.
author: kody-w + Copilot
